title: Haven's End Mod Pack
description: Custom Client Mod Pack for Haven's End SMP
body:
## 🌙 Haven’s End SMP Modpack

Welcome to **Haven’s End**, a private (whitelisted) survival multiplayer world focused on community, creativity, and immersive atmosphere.  
This modpack provides the visual polish and quality-of-life features used on the official Haven’s End SMP.

---

### ✨ Features
- **Enhanced visuals** – Complementary Unbound Shaders with Iris + Sodium for smooth performance and rich lighting  
- **Immersive animations** – Entity Model & Texture Features, Player Animation Library, and Emotecraft  
- **Better interface** – Mod Menu, AppleSkin, Jade, and Text Placeholder API for clear information display  
- **Exploration tools** – Xaero’s Minimap and World Map for navigation without breaking immersion  

---

### ⚙️ Usage
This pack is **client-side only** and meant exclusively for the Haven’s End SMP.  
It enhances visuals and usability while keeping gameplay fair — no cheats or gameplay advantages.

---

### 🛡️ Important
- Access is limited to approved members of the Haven’s End server  
- Redistribution or public re-uploading is **not permitted**  
- All included mods are property of their respective authors under their listed licenses
